RUNNINGCONFIG.LINE: license udi pid IR829GW-LTE-NA-AK9 sn FTX1806VLIN-
license boot module ir800 technology-package datak9 disable

STARTUPCONFIG.LINE: license udi pid IR829GW-LTE-NA-AK9 sn FTX1806VLIN-
license boot module ir800 technology-package datak9 disable

LICENSE.LICENSE_STATE: Active, Not in Use, EULA accepted

FILE_CONTENT.TEXT: <html>DOWNLOADING, INSTALLING, OR USING THE CISCO PACKET TRACER SOFTWARE CONSTITUTES ACCEPTANCE OF THE CISCO END USER LICENSE AGREEMENT("EULA" https://www.cisco.com/c/en/us/about/legal/cloud-and-software/end_user_license_agreement.html) AND THE SUPPLEMENTAL END USER LICENSE AGREEMENT FOR CISCO PACKET TRACER ("SEULA" https://www.cisco.com/c/dam/en_us/about/doing_business/legal/seula/cisco-packet-tracer-software.pdf). IF YOU DO NOT AGREE TO ALL OF THE TERMS OF THE EULA AND SEULA, THEN CISCO SYSTEMS, INC. ("CISCO") IS UNWILLING TO LICENSE THE SOFTWARE TO YOU AND YOU ARE NOT AUTHORIZED TO DOWNLOAD, INSTALL OR USE THE SOFTWARE.</html>

PORT.DESCRIPTION: the embedded AP GigabitEthernet 0 is an internal interface connecting AP with the host router

RUNNINGCONFIG.LINE: description the embedded AP GigabitEthernet 0 is an internal interface connecting AP with the host router
